title: Voice of Customer Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger voice of customer foundations judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Voice of Customer Foundations is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Voice of Customer Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good voice of customer foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Voice of Customer Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
